raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Juns wiffeem / kas juhs
Karra-Wihri effat/ buhs apkahrt
to Pilsfajtu eet/apstaigadami to
Pilsfahtu weenreisi/ ta buhs tew
fefchas Deenas darriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un feptin Preesteri laid fep-
tin Gawilefchanas Taures neff
preekſch Schkirsta / un juhs eite
feptitâ Deena feptinkahrt apkahrt
to Pilsfahtu / un laid tee Pree-
steri ar Taurehm taure.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tee to Taurefchanu
garri wilks/un juhs tahs Taure-
fchanas Skannu dsirdat / tad
buhs teem Laudim ar leelu Gawi-
lefchanu gawileht / tad apgruhs
ta Pilsfahta Muhti/ un tad buhs
teem Laudim eekſcha kahpt ik-
weens preekſch fewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad azinaja Josuûs Nun-
na Dehls tohs Breesterus/un faz-
zija us teem : Neffeet to Derri-
bas Schkirstu / un laid feptin
Preestexi feptin Gawilefchanas
Taureênefs ta KUNGA Schkir-
fta Preekſcha.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un us teem Laudim fazzijs
wiſch : Eite un apstaigajt to
Pilsfahtu/ un kas apbrunnohts
trr / lai tas eet ta KUNGA
Schkirsta Preekſcha.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un itt ka Josuûs us teem
Laudim bij fazzijs/ ta staigaja tee
feptin Preestexi / nedami feptin
Gawilefchanas Taures ta KUN-
ftam preekſcha / tee
ureja ar Taurehm/un
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kas apbrunnohts bija
gahje to Preestexu Preekſcha/ &
ar Taurehm taureja / un t
Pulks gahje tainSchkirstam pa-
kaf/ staigadami un tauredami
Taurehm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Josuûs bij teem La-
dim pawehlejis/ fazzidams: Ju-
ne buhs gawileht / laid arrids-
juhfu Balkfne ne tohp dsirdet-
un laid ne kahds Wahrdg no ju-
fas Muttes iseet / lihds tai D-
nai/ kad es jums fazzifchn: G-
wilejeet/tad buhs jums gawile-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſch likke ta KUN-
GA Schkirstu apkahrt to Pi-
fahtu eet / apstaigadams win-
weenreifi / tad nahze tee at-
Lehgeri / un palikke zaur Na-
Lehgeri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz to zehlahs Josu-
Rihtâ agri/ un tee Preestexi ne-
ta KUNGA Schkirstu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee feptin Preestexi/
tahs feptin Gawilefchanas Ta-
res nefte preekſch ta KUNG-
Schkirsta / gahje probjam / i-
taureja ar Taurehm/ un tee A-
brunnotee gahje teem preekſch-
un tas Pulks gahje ta KUNG-
Schkirstam pakat/ kamchrt ste-
gahts tappe/ tauredains ar Ta-
rehm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad apstaigaja tee to Pil-
fahtu ohtra Deena weenreifi /
greesahs atkat Lehgeri/ ta dar-
ja tee fech Deenas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un feptitâ Deena zehla-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
